news.text: Delta Air Lines taps Amazon Leo for in-flight Wi-Fi as streaming wars heat up
EU tells members to prepare for 'prolonged disruption' to energy markets from Iran war - Reuters
Oil whipsaws as traders weigh Iran de-escalation report against prolonged Hormuz closure - Reuters
UK economy limped into the end of last year before Iran war - Reuters
Pakistani foreign minister to discuss Iran during China visit, Chinese ministry says - Reuters
Exclusive: German institutes cut 2026, 2027 growth forecasts, raise inflation outlook, sources say - Reuters

brief:
◆ Market Overview

Mixed pre-market action with DOW green (+0.15%) while tech-heavy NASDAQ lags (-0.76%). VIX at 39.16 signals elevated fear, but down 0.63% suggests some tension relief. Iran war headlines dominating flow with energy disruption concerns weighing on growth sectors.

◆ What to Watch

  • Oil volatility - Crude whipsawing on Iran de-escalation rumors vs. Hormuz closure reality
  • Energy sector rotation - XLE down 0.96% despite geopolitical premium, watch for reversal
  • Tech weakness - XLK bleeding -1.86%, megacap earnings season approaching
  • Delta-Amazon partnership - Streaming wars expansion into airline space

◆ Sector Rotation

Classic risk-off rotation underway. Defensives leading with Financials (+1.15%), Utilities (+0.72%), and Comm Services (+0.86%) catching safe-haven flows. Tech and Industrials bleeding hardest at -1.86% and -1.63% respectively. Small caps getting crushed with Russell down 1.44% - growth fears hitting hardest where they always do first.
⚡ Key Driver
Iran war creating dual headwinds: energy supply disruption fears plus global growth slowdown concerns as EU and Germany cut forecasts
⚠ Bear Case
VIX still elevated near 39 with tech leading lower. If Iran situation escalates further, growth stocks could see another leg down
✦ Bull Case
De-escalation rumors already surfacing. If Iran tensions cool, this defensive rotation could reverse fast with oversold tech leading the bounce

◆ Levels That Matter

  • SPY 630 - Key support level, break targets 620
  • QQQ 555 - Pre-market low, must hold or accelerates to 540
  • VIX 40 - Psychological resistance, break above signals more pain
  • XLE 88 - Energy sector pivot point for war premium play

Not a prediction. A preparation. Make your plan before the bell.
